title: IIM Kozhikode is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: IIM Kozhikode is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIM Kozhikode. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About IIM Kozhikode:
IIM Kozhikode is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Kozhikode!
